titleStmt.title: SII 5.997: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 997. (A.R. No. 132 of 1896). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum ñjayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātu nnayan tu pulka Arumaṟai viti neṟiyaṉaittu n=ta ḻaippa varumuṟai yurimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭai ticaikkaḷu ṟeṭṭu n=ta ṅku taṉikkūṭa n=tā neṉa viḷaṅkak karuṅkalippaṭṭiyaic ceṅkol turappap
porukati rāḻi puvivaḷattuṭaṉ vara villava riraṭṭar miṉavar ciṅkaḷar pallavar nutaliyar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpaka maṇṇakam puran tu cempoṉ vīra- siṁhāsana ttu Ulakuṭai mukakokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum vīṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya koparakesarivanmarā na tribhuvanaccakra vattikaḷ śrīrājarājade varkku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrkoṭṭattu ttaniyūr śrīmadhurān=takaccaturvvedimaṅgala ttu mahāsabhai yom Eḻuttu nammur Āḷuṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyār koyilil de vakaṉmikaḷum śrīmāheśvara k kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum śrīkāriyañceyvāṉuṅ koyilkaṇakkanuṅ kaṇṭu Ikkoyilil tiru
utsa vam Eḻun=ta ruḷum matu raināyakade var canippavaṉi Eḻun=ta ruḷukaikku coḻamaṇṭalattu rāja nārā yaṇavaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaḻun tūrnāṭṭuk kīranūr vācattūruṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānāṉa Utaiyapālaṉ Iśrīmathurān=takaccaturvedimaṅgala ttu rājakesari cceri Irāyūrc coṭṭaik kecavabha ṭṭaṉ
pakkal koṇṭu tan=ta nilam Ivvūrt talaippāṭakam vīracoḻavāykkālukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu vīranārāyaṇavatikkuk kiḻakku Eḻāñ catirattil kiḻai Eṭṭil neṭuṅkaḻuval pāṭakam ka�m teṉkiḻakkaṭaiyap pāṭakam nta� m Ākap pāṭakam Iraṇṭukkum Iraṇṭu kācu vilaiyākap peci Iṭṭu Ikke
cavabha ṭṭaṉpakkal koṇṭu tan=ta Ippāṭaka miraṇṭum kācukoḷḷā Iṟaiyiliyākat tantom Iṉnilaṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭiye kallilum veṭṭica canippavani Eḻu- n=ta ruḷivikkaveṉṟu mahāsabhai yuḷ niṉṟu paṇittār śrīmadhurān=ta kacceri Irāyūrc coṭṭai Aṉan=ta nārāyaṇabha ṭṭaṉ paṇikkap paṇiyāl Ivvūrkkara
ṇattāṉ tiruppulivaṉamuṭaiyāṉ Ekāmparatevanāṉa ma hājanapri yaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Irāyūrc coṭṭai Aṉan=ta nārāyaṇabha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūrc coṭṭaik kekavabha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuṇṭur govin=tabha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Iḻakkantiṟattu
vāmaṉabha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
Digital edition of SII 5.997 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
